class.name: AbilitySystemAbilityContainer
class.brief_description: Pure data container that defines an actor archetype.
class.description: [AbilitySystemAbilityContainer] is a pure storage [Resource] that defines the [b]archetype[/b] of an actor (Player, Zombie, NPC). It groups the full catalog of abilities, effects, tags, an [AbilitySystemAttributeSet], and cues into a single reusable asset. [b]Important:[/b] The container does [b]NOT[/b] grant abilities or initialize attributes directly. The [AbilitySystemAttributeSet] stored inside it is the one responsible for defining which abilities are unlocked and what initial attribute values to use. The container is applied to an [AbilitySystemComponent] via [method AbilitySystemComponent.apply_ability_container].

method.name: has_ability
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if [param ability] is part of the catalog of abilities this container authorizes. Checks both the [member abilities] list and any abilities granted by the [member attribute_set].

method.name: has_cue
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if a [AbilitySystemCue] with the given [param tag] is registered in this container's [member cues] list.

method.name: has_effect
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if [param effect] is registered in this container's [member effects] list, or as a cost/cooldown effect of any catalogued ability. Used by [method AbilitySystemComponent.make_outgoing_spec] to enforce the archetype contract before allowing the effect to be instantiated.

members.member: Full catalog of [AbilitySystemAbility] resources this archetype can potentially use. These are [b]not[/b] granted automatically — only those listed in the [member attribute_set]'s [code]granted_abilities[/code] are actually unlocked.
The [AbilitySystemAttributeSet] responsible for initializing the actor. It defines attribute definitions, initial values, and which abilities from the catalog are already granted.
List of [AbilitySystemCue] resources associated with this archetype.
List of [AbilitySystemEffect] resources applied automatically when the container is loaded (usually Infinite duration).
List of Tags granted permanently by this archetype.
